open_master_plans.title: Active Plan Index Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Make active plans, master plans, and nearby closeout state easier to find at a glance through one compact

open_master_plans.title: Legacy Frontend Decommission Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Remove the current multi-route legacy frontend and converge development onto a Vision-first frontend model while the product is still in dev phase and no real users depend on the legacy screens.

open_master_plans.title: Legacy Purge Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Remove the remaining legacy `workmarket` naming and documentation surface from the product where it is still active, while preserving the current `vision` UX, backend capability model, and chat surface.

open_master_plans.title: Vision Context Memory Expansion Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Give `/vision` a backend-owned memory layer that separates stable user context, current session context, and turn-level context so the orchestrator can handle multi-topic conversation shifts without flattening everything into one prompt blob.

open_master_plans.title: Backend Drift Remediation Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Keep the source-of-truth, docs, generated audits, and backend code aligned while reducing the remaining oversized or mixed-responsibility backend surfaces.

open_master_plans.title: Backend Model Standardization Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Make backend transport models and service layers look and behave the same across domains unless there is a clear domain-specific reason not to.

open_master_plans.title: Codex Context Manifest Standardization Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Reduce future token spend by making `make codex-context` emit one compact execution manifest that can be read instead of reconstructing plan, audit, and evidence state from several files.

open_master_plans.title: Codex Context Orchestration V2 Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Reduce token spend and repeated recomposition cost for repeated Codex sessions by making the local context gateway more deterministic, more selective, and more parallel where the work is independent.

open_master_plans.title: Codex Local Context Orchestrator Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Turn the existing local context gateway into a more decisive orchestration layer that:

open_master_plans.title: Codex Summary Compactification Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Reduce repeated token spend on broad report review by making the most frequently read generated summaries shorter, more decision-first, and more consistent.

open_master_plans.title: Codex Summary Compactification Phase 2 Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Reduce the remaining broad-report token cost by tightening the last three noisy summary surfaces and regenerating the stale context manifest.

open_master_plans.title: Codex Summary Compactification Phase 3 Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Make the remaining broad generated summaries shorter without losing the decision signal or the top evidence samples.

open_master_plans.title: Codex Summary Compactification Phase 4 Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Reduce token spend on the remaining high-noise report families by compacting them in a fixed sequence of narrow batch plans.

open_master_plans.title: Remaining 23 Local Tooling Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Implement the remaining `CODEX-LOCAL-*` items from `docs/codex-local-tooling-todo.md` in sequential phases without pausing between items.

open_master_plans.title: Master Plan Preference Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Record that master-plan orchestration is allowed and preferred for broad, long-running, high-complexity work so agents can reduce unnecessary human interaction and handle larger tasks autonomously.

open_master_plans.title: Product Memory and Vision Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Separate open work from historical knowledge, then encode what we learn into a reusable memory layer and a clear product-vision model that can guide future UX, network, and interaction choices.

open_master_plans.title: System Standardization Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Standardize the current codebase into a small number of predictable module patterns:

open_master_plans.title: Vision Adaptive Architecture Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Build the future `/vision` architecture as the primary long-term product surface: a white, visually quiet, adaptive blank canvas that reveals prompt fields, guided inputs, results, confirmations, and visual structure only when the current task needs them.

open_master_plans.status: complete for the phase 1 modern surface objective
open_master_plans.title: Vision Modern Prompt Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Replace the current vision screen with a minimalist agent-centered surface:

open_master_plans.title: Vision Profile Circles Applications Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Tighten `/vision` so profile, circles, and applications behave like one terminal-first workspace instead of isolated read-only snapshots plus separate mutation pilots.

open_master_plans.title: Vision Voice Master Plan
open_master_plans.goal: Introduce a typed backend voice capability/config contract, connect `/vision` to browser-native speech recognition and speech synthesis through that contract, and update the living docs and agent-operating surfaces accordingly.

open_plans.title: Active Plan Index Generator Plan
open_plans.goal: Generate a compact active plan index that shows open plans, open master plans, and completed planning artifacts in one

open_plans.title: Active Plan Index Routing Plan
open_plans.goal: Make the planning docs point at the active-plan index first so broad work can find open plan state quickly without

open_plans.title: Active Plan Index Validation Plan
open_plans.goal: Make the new active-plan index deterministic, auditable, and easy to keep fresh when plans are added, closed, or

open_plans.title: Vision Context Memory User And Session Plan
open_plans.goal: Add a backend-owned memory context to `/vision` that carries stable user context, current session context, and recent turn context into semantic understanding.

open_plans.title: Agent Model Feature Coverage Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-AGENT-MODEL-FEATURE-COVERAGE-AUDIT` to report code features not yet linked to the agent operating model or simulation surface.

open_plans.title: Aggregate Dead Code Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-AGGREGATE-DEAD-CODE-AUDIT` as one wrapper that runs dead-code audits and emits a compact merged summary.

open_plans.title: Async Mutation Flow Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-ASYNC-MUTATION-FLOW-AUDIT` to inventory frontend mutation flows, refresh paths, banners, and error handling.

open_plans.title: Audit Documentation Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-AUDIT-DOCUMENTATION` as one short page describing local audits, outputs, and recommended usage order.

open_plans.title: Automation Readiness Gap Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-AUTOMATION-READINESS-GAP-AUDIT` to check minimum automation-relevant coverage for each feature/workflow.

open_plans.title: Autonomous Continuation Preference Plan
open_plans.goal: Future sessions should continue through safe offered follow-up slices by default unless the user narrows scope, a real blocker appears, or approval is required.

open_plans.title: Backend Audit Identity DTO Tightening Plan
Backend Audit Location DTO Tightening Plan
Backend Dead Code Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-BACKEND-DEAD-CODE-AUDIT` as a local Java/Spring dead-code candidate report with confidence buckets.

open_plans.title: Codex Workflow Lean Context Smoke Plan
Config Sprawl Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-CONFIG-SPRAWL-AUDIT` to inventory operational config spread and lingering `@Value` usage.

open_plans.title: Doc Coverage Gap Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-DOC-COVERAGE-GAP-AUDIT` to report backend/frontend feature surfaces missing mirrors in required living docs.

open_plans.title: Docs To Code Drift Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-DOCS-TO-CODE-DRIFT-AUDIT` to cross-check docs against runtime endpoint, workflow, status, and action surfaces.

open_plans.title: Domain Ownership Inventory Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-DOMAIN-OWNERSHIP-INVENTORY` to group files by domain, owner, and layer for compact navigation.

open_plans.title: Dormant Code Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-DORMANT-CODE-AUDIT` to inventory dormant, placeholder, or partially wired compiled code paths.

open_plans.title: Duplicate Logic Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-DUPLICATE-LOGIC-AUDIT` so Codex can inspect duplicated status, permission, and action-label logic locally instead of rediscovering cross-layer drift by hand.

open_plans.title: Error Pattern Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-ERROR-PATTERN-AUDIT` to detect recurring backend failure and exception patterns worth centralizing.

open_plans.title: Feature Intro Check Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-FEATURE-INTRO-CHECK` as a helper that checks whether new workflows triggered all required docs, contract, and sandbox follow-up.

open_plans.title: File Relation Graph Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-FILE-RELATION-GRAPH` to build a lightweight controller-service-repository-dto-frontend-view relation graph.

open_plans.title: Frontend Dead Code Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-FRONTEND-DEAD-CODE-AUDIT` as a local inventory for likely-unused frontend files, exports, dependencies, and orphaned scripts/config.

open_plans.title: Make Target Index Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-MAKE-TARGET-INDEX` as stable target documentation and coverage for all local helper audits.

open_plans.title: Manual Cleanup Candidate Report Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-MANUAL-CLEANUP-CANDIDATE-REPORT` as a high-confidence merged shortlist for human cleanup review.

open_plans.title: Naming Consistency Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-NAMING-CONSISTENCY-AUDIT` to report terminology drift across backend, frontend, and docs.

open_plans.title: Permission Rule Duplication Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-PERMISSION-RULE-DUPLICATION-AUDIT` so Codex can inspect permission gates and allowed-action duplication across backend sources, DTO assembly, and frontend gating code without broad manual repo scans.

open_plans.title: Product Vision Entry Points Plan
open_plans.goal: Clarify how the app should feel, show screen archetypes and frontend epics, and route future product-direction work through the canonical memory and vision docs first.
Fix the quest application submit/detail reload failure caused by lazy proxy access while building the quest detail response.
Allow a user to withdraw their own quest application from the quest detail flow while the application is still pending.

open_plans.title: Rich Text Safety Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-RICH-TEXT-SAFETY-AUDIT` to inventory rich-text fields, sanitization paths, and frontend renderers.

open_plans.title: Sandbox Generation Coverage Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-SANDBOX-GENERATION-COVERAGE-AUDIT` to compare entities/validations/workflows with synthetic admin or sandbox generation coverage.

open_plans.title: State Transition Coverage Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-STATE-TRANSITION-COVERAGE-AUDIT` to map documented and code-visible transitions to scenario/contract test coverage.

open_plans.title: Style Token Usage Audit Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-STYLE-TOKEN-USAGE-AUDIT` to inventory frontend token and shared-component usage versus one-off styling.

open_plans.title: Test Surface Inventory Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-TEST-SURFACE-INVENTORY` to inventory test coverage layers across services, workflows, and DTOs.

open_plans.title: Validation Memory Canonicalization Plan
open_plans.goal: Add one stable validation-memory reference that captures exact validator expectations, canonical command strings, and closeout heuristics so future sessions can avoid rediscovering them through failing audits.

open_plans.title: Validation Memory Closeout Hardening Plan
open_plans.goal: Standardize validation-memory closeout support by making drift checks part of the standard closeout loop and by generating a compact closeout command card from the canonical validation-memory JSON.

open_plans.title: Validation Memory Phase Two Plan
open_plans.goal: Add a schema-backed JSON validation-memory contract and integrate its canonical command knowledge into local preset recommendations and context routing as an additive layer.

open_plans.title: Validation Memory Phase Three Plan
open_plans.goal: Keep closeout checks and validation-memory docs synchronized by sourcing canonical command expectations from `docs/validation-memory.json` and auditing drift between `docs/validation-memory.md` and the JSON contract.

open_plans.title: Vision Blank Canvas 001 Plan
open_plans.goal: Deliver the first concrete `/vision` blank-canvas slice so the route shell feels quieter, more adaptive, and less like a normal page with visible chrome.

open_plans.title: Vision Create Quest Conversation Expansion Plan
Vision Detail Parity Plan
open_plans.goal: Finish the current Vision terminal-first parity slice by routing remaining read-only settings and detail entry points through the shared conversation flow instead of dedicated route views.

open_plans.status: planning only. do not implement until explicitly requested
open_plans.title: Vision Executor Rollout Plan

open_plans.status: planning only. do not implement until explicitly requested
open_plans.title: Vision Frontend Canvas Plan
Vision Frontend Surface Standardization Plan
open_plans.goal: Replace the current route-level all-in-one implementation with a stable structure that is easier to extend toward the long-term blank-canvas vision surface.

open_plans.status: planning only. no runtime implementation in this plan
open_plans.title: Vision Preflight Plan
Vision Resume Continuity Plan
open_plans.goal: Recent conversations should expose enough deterministic metadata for the frontend to distinguish active clarifications, review-ready tasks, blocked tasks, and completed tasks without reconstructing state from raw strings.

open_plans.title: Vision Review Edit Action Plan
open_plans.goal: The review loop should no longer depend on prompt strings like `change reward`.

open_plans.title: Vision Schedule Date Time Split Implementation Plan
open_plans.goal: Implement the full Vision scheduling split so `/vision` collects `scheduled_date` and `scheduled_time` separately, derives `scheduled_at` only at the execution boundary, and updates backend, frontend, docs, and tests together.

open_plans.title: Vision Semantic Slot Guardrails Plan
open_plans.goal: Reduce create-quest parser leakage so text and voice prompts stop spilling into the wrong slots, especially description, reward, and location.

open_plans.title: Vision Surface, Parser, and Mapping Plan
Vision Surface Screen Plan
open_plans.goal: Create a full-screen adaptive canvas route with parallel audio and visual feedback, dynamic result filtering, and a playful high-contrast visual language.

open_plans.status: planning only. do not implement until explicitly requested
open_plans.title: Vision Validation And Documentation Plan

complete_plans.title: Agent Surface Standardization Master Plan
complete_plans.goal: Standardize the shared orchestration model behind:

complete_plans.title: Codex Implementation Reliability Master Plan
complete_plans.goal: Clean up and standardize the Codex control surface so implementation work becomes faster, more precise, more accurate, and more reliable.

complete_plans.title: Machine-Readable-First Docs Master Plan
complete_plans.goal: Make machine-readable operational and control files the primary source of truth for active behavior, planning state, and validation state, while keeping human-readable docs as derived summaries or curated narrative where needed.

complete_plans.title: Vision Memory And Context Master Plan
complete_plans.goal: Add a persistent vision-specific memory layer across docs, workflow entrypoints, and reusable test fixtures.

complete_plans.title: Vision Schedule Date Time Split Master Plan
complete_plans.goal: Replace the current single-slot `scheduled_at` conversation model in `/vision` with a layered scheduling model that treats date and time as separate user-facing concepts while still deriving one absolute execution timestamp only when the backend has enough deterministic information.

complete_plans.title: Agent Surface Standardization Phase 2 Plan
complete_plans.goal: Standardize the shared semantic planning boundary used by Vision and Admin Playground so both surfaces rely on one backend prompt semantics path for normalization and intent classification.

complete_plans.title: Codex Context Review Nomenclature Plan
complete_plans.goal: Rename the `codex-context` human-facing output and its references to `latest.review.md`, while keeping `latest.machine.json`

complete_plans.title: Codex Control Surface Hierarchy Plan
complete_plans.goal: Standardize how the repo describes live truth, generated control, and historical archive material so Codex always knows which files are authoritative for current work.

complete_plans.title: Codex Local Tooling Compactification Plan
complete_plans.goal: Make local-tooling outputs compact, reviewer-useful, and consistent with the new review/machine/explain naming model so Codex can consume them faster.

complete_plans.title: Codex Validation And Closeout Hardening Plan
complete_plans.goal: Make validation, freshness, closeout, and plan completion checks more deterministic so Codex can trust the current repository state without re-discovering the same issues.

complete_plans.title: Legacy Frontend Freeze And Boundary Plan
Legacy Frontend Inventory And Gap Plan
complete_plans.goal: Produce the precise dependency map of legacy routes, modules, API wrappers, shared components, style files, and generated contracts so legacy frontend decommission can proceed by route family instead of guesswork.

complete_plans.title: Machine-Readable-First Policy Plan
complete_plans.goal: Define the authoritative hierarchy for active state, generated control, and archive material so current behavior is always read from machine-readable sources first.

complete_plans.title: Machine-Readable-First Workflow Plan
complete_plans.goal: Update workflow guidance so Codex starts from machine-readable control artifacts, uses human docs as supporting context, and preserves generated summaries as non-authoritative outputs.

entries.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-RICH-TEXT-SAFETY-AUDIT` to inventory rich-text fields, sanitization paths, and frontend renderers.

entries.title: Sandbox Generation Coverage Audit Plan
entries.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-SANDBOX-GENERATION-COVERAGE-AUDIT` to compare entities/validations/workflows with synthetic admin or sandbox generation coverage.

entries.title: State Transition Coverage Audit Plan
entries.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-STATE-TRANSITION-COVERAGE-AUDIT` to map documented and code-visible transitions to scenario/contract test coverage.

entries.title: Style Token Usage Audit Plan
entries.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-STYLE-TOKEN-USAGE-AUDIT` to inventory frontend token and shared-component usage versus one-off styling.

entries.title: Test Surface Inventory Plan
entries.goal: Implement `CODEX-LOCAL-TEST-SURFACE-INVENTORY` to inventory test coverage layers across services, workflows, and DTOs.

entries.title: Validation Memory Canonicalization Plan
entries.goal: Add one stable validation-memory reference that captures exact validator expectations, canonical command strings, and closeout heuristics so future sessions can avoid rediscovering them through failing audits.

entries.title: Validation Memory Closeout Hardening Plan
entries.goal: Standardize validation-memory closeout support by making drift checks part of the standard closeout loop and by generating a compact closeout command card from the canonical validation-memory JSON.

entries.title: Validation Memory Phase Two Plan
entries.goal: Add a schema-backed JSON validation-memory contract and integrate its canonical command knowledge into local preset recommendations and context routing as an additive layer.

entries.title: Validation Memory Phase Three Plan
entries.goal: Keep closeout checks and validation-memory docs synchronized by sourcing canonical command expectations from `docs/validation-memory.json` and auditing drift between `docs/validation-memory.md` and the JSON contract.

entries.title: Vision Blank Canvas 001 Plan
entries.goal: Deliver the first concrete `/vision` blank-canvas slice so the route shell feels quieter, more adaptive, and less like a normal page with visible chrome.

entries.title: Vision Create Quest Conversation Expansion Plan
Vision Detail Parity Plan
entries.goal: Finish the current Vision terminal-first parity slice by routing remaining read-only settings and detail entry points through the shared conversation flow instead of dedicated route views.

entries.status: planning only. do not implement until explicitly requested
entries.title: Vision Executor Rollout Plan

entries.status: planning only. do not implement until explicitly requested
entries.title: Vision Frontend Canvas Plan
Vision Frontend Surface Standardization Plan
entries.goal: Replace the current route-level all-in-one implementation with a stable structure that is easier to extend toward the long-term blank-canvas vision surface.

entries.status: planning only. no runtime implementation in this plan
entries.title: Vision Preflight Plan
Vision Resume Continuity Plan
entries.goal: Recent conversations should expose enough deterministic metadata for the frontend to distinguish active clarifications, review-ready tasks, blocked tasks, and completed tasks without reconstructing state from raw strings.

entries.title: Vision Review Edit Action Plan
entries.goal: The review loop should no longer depend on prompt strings like `change reward`.

entries.title: Vision Schedule Date Time Split Implementation Plan
entries.goal: Implement the full Vision scheduling split so `/vision` collects `scheduled_date` and `scheduled_time` separately, derives `scheduled_at` only at the execution boundary, and updates backend, frontend, docs, and tests together.

entries.title: Vision Semantic Slot Guardrails Plan
entries.goal: Reduce create-quest parser leakage so text and voice prompts stop spilling into the wrong slots, especially description, reward, and location.

entries.title: Vision Surface, Parser, and Mapping Plan
Vision Surface Screen Plan
entries.goal: Create a full-screen adaptive canvas route with parallel audio and visual feedback, dynamic result filtering, and a playful high-contrast visual language.

entries.status: planning only. do not implement until explicitly requested
entries.title: Vision Validation And Documentation Plan
